reference_image.critical_note: The reference image IS the panel. Match its style and edge treatment exactly.

normal.description: Canonical resting state — reproduce the panel exactly as shown in the source: same silhouette, same colors, same style, same edge treatment. No state-specific modifications.

forbidden_content: stripping or altering any backgrounds, frames, or borders that are visible in the source
text or labels not in the source
priority_rules: DIMENSIONS MUST match the reference image exactly
Edge treatment must tile cleanly as a 9-slice background
